name: Marco Holcomb vase set — confirm brief

name: Prep glaze demo for 6-week class
desc: Prepare cone-6 satin-matte glaze demo for the current 6-week pottery class.

name: Kiln check — replace Skutt elements
desc: Inspect and replace worn elements on the Skutt KMT-1218-3 kiln.

name: Dinnerware set — packed & shipped to Marco Holcomb
desc: Six-piece cone-6 dinner set fired, packed, and shipped.

name: Order clay & glaze materials for spring session
desc: Restock stoneware clay and glaze chemicals for the spring 6-week class.

name: Reorganize glaze shelf & label test tiles
desc: Sort glaze buckets and label recent cone-6 test tiles.

name: Glaze test tiles for teapot commission
desc: Review satin-matte earth-tone test tiles before the final glaze firing.

name: Send week-1 handout to students
desc: Distributed centering & wedging handout to Dana Reed, Sofia Marsh, and Noor Aziz.

name: Plan studio open-house weekend
desc: Plan a weekend studio open house and sale.

name: Throw & trim serving bowls (Sofia Marsh order)
desc: Throwing and trimming the serving-bowl commission.

name: Review student piece list for bisque firing
desc: Check which student pieces are ready for the next bisque load.

name: File Q4 studio expenses
desc: Reconciled Q4 studio expenses and receipts.
